requirement_topic.en: Local Authorised Importer / Dealer and Serbian Language Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 本地授权进口商/经销商与塞尔维亚语标注
requirement_topic.zht: 本地授權進口商/經銷商與塞爾維亞語標注

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers placing radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment on the Serbian market must appoint a local authorised importer or dealer established in Serbia. The authorised importer is responsible for ensuring the product holds a valid RATEL type approval certificate and that the product labelling and user documentation are in Serbian. Product labels must include the importer's name, address, and contact information. User manuals and safety instructions must be available in Serbian. This is a hard market-access requirement with no exemption for EU or other foreign certificates.
summary.zh: 将无线电设备和电信终端设备投放塞尔维亚市场的境外制造商，须在塞尔维亚指定一名当地授权进口商或经销商。授权进口商负责确保产品持有有效的RATEL型式核准证书，并保证产品标签和用户文件使用塞尔维亚语。产品标签须包含进口商的名称、地址和联系方式。用户手册和安全说明须提供塞尔维亚语版本。这是硬性市场准入要求，欧盟或其他境外证书均无豁免。
summary.zht: 將無線電設備和電信終端設備投放塞爾維亞市場的境外製造商，須在塞爾維亞指定一名當地授權進口商或經銷商。授權進口商負責確保產品持有有效的RATEL型式核准證書，並保證產品標籤和用戶文件使用塞爾維亞語。產品標籤須包含進口商的名稱、地址和聯繫方式。用戶手冊和安全說明須提供塞爾維亞語版本。這是硬性市場准入要求，歐盟或其他境外證書均無豁免。

standards_or_laws: Law on Electronic Communications (Republic of Serbia) — importer obligations
RATEL type approval conditions — authorised importer / representative requirement
Consumer Protection Act (Serbia) — Serbian language labelling obligation
Law on Technical Requirements for Products and Conformity Assessment (Serbia) — market surveillance and importer responsibilities

summary.en: China does not require a locally-established importer for foreign wireless devices in the same way; instead, MIIT type approval (SRRC / NAL) is obtained by the manufacturer or their agent directly. Chinese-market product labelling is in Chinese (Mandarin) and must comply with GB standards for labelling content. There is no direct Chinese equivalent to the Serbian authorised importer obligation.
summary.zh: 中国对境外无线设备不以同样方式要求在华设立本地进口商；MIIT型式核准（SRRC/NAL）由制造商或其代理直接申请。中国市场产品标注使用中文（普通话），须符合GB标准的标注内容要求。塞尔维亚授权进口商义务在中国无直接对应项。
summary.zht: 中國對境外無線設備不以同樣方式要求在華設立本地進口商；MIIT型式核准（SRRC/NAL）由製造商或其代理直接申請。中國市場產品標注使用中文（普通話），須符合GB標準的標注內容要求。塞爾維亞授權進口商義務在中國無直接對應項。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — applicant may be manufacturer or authorised agent (no mandatory local importer entity required)
GB 5296.1-2012 — Instructions for use of consumer products (Chinese language labelling)
GB 7247 / GB 10408 product label GB content requirements

gap.en: China has no equivalent local-importer mandate for the Serbian market. Manufacturers must establish or contract a legally-registered Serbian entity to act as authorised importer/dealer before RATEL type approval can be activated for market placement. All product labelling and user documentation must be translated into Serbian. This is an additional compliance step with no analogue in the SRRC/NAL process.
gap.zh: 中国针对塞尔维亚市场没有等效的本地进口商强制要求。制造商须在RATEL型式核准可用于市场投放前，建立或签约一家在塞尔维亚合法注册的实体作为授权进口商/经销商。所有产品标签和用户文件须翻译成塞尔维亚语。这是SRRC/NAL流程中没有对应项的额外合规步骤。
gap.zht: 中國針對塞爾維亞市場沒有等效的本地進口商強制要求。製造商須在RATEL型式核准可用於市場投放前，建立或簽約一家在塞爾維亞合法註冊的實體作為授權進口商/經銷商。所有產品標籤和用戶文件須翻譯成塞爾維亞語。這是SRRC/NAL流程中沒有對應項的額外合規步驟。

source.publisher: RATEL — Regulatory Agency for Electronic Communications and Postal Services (Serbia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Appointment of a locally-registered Serbian authorised importer or dealer and Serbian language labelling of product and user documentation are mandatory for market access in Serbia. There is no Chinese-side equivalent. These requirements must be addressed before the product can be sold in Serbia, regardless of RATEL type approval status. Verify specific importer registration and labelling obligations with a qualified Serbian legal or regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 指定在塞尔维亚注册的授权进口商或经销商，以及产品和用户文件的塞尔维亚语标注，是进入塞尔维亚市场的强制要求。中国方面无等效项。无论RATEL型式核准状态如何，产品在塞尔维亚销售前须满足这些要求。请向合格的塞尔维亚法律或监管专业人士核实具体的进口商注册和标注义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 指定在塞爾維亞注冊的授權進口商或經銷商，以及產品和用戶文件的塞爾維亞語標注，是進入塞爾維亞市場的強制要求。中國方面無等效項。無論RATEL型式核准狀態如何，產品在塞爾維亞銷售前須滿足這些要求。請向合格的塞爾維亞法律或監管專業人士核實具體的進口商注冊和標注義務。
